name: Forest Archer
description: Master the bow in this epic Action challenge! Aim, time your shots, and battle shifting winds in the ultimate Archery experience. Each level gets tougher—test your Hunting skills and become the legend of the forest
instructions: How to Play PC Mouse Aim amp Power Click and drag the mouse back to aim and set power Shoot Release the left mouse button to fire the arrow Mobile Touch Aim amp Power Touch and drag your finger on the screen to aim Shoot Lift your finger
